_comment: First-frame + last-frame keyframe interpolation. Requires `role` field on each image_url. Valid roles for seedance-1-5-pro: 'first_frame', 'last_frame'. Other roles (e.g. 'reference', 'reference_image') are rejected — see error_invalid_role.json and error_multiref_unsupported.json.

content.text: Smooth cinematic transition between two scenes
